flow.action: boot public observer from checked-in signed registry
flow.protocol_gate: registry signature, pinned signer, chain/network/genesis/profile/tx-index commitments
flow.state_transition: local observer node starts; no validator signing

flow.action: create account / submit allowed onboarding transaction upstream
flow.failure_code: tx admission/apply failure code from failure_code_registry_v1_5
flow.protocol_gate: transaction admission, chain id, signature, account/key custody rules
flow.state_transition: account exists if tx is admitted and finalized under current phase

flow.protocol_gate: PoH status and Tier 2 protocol predicates
flow.route_or_tx: PoH bootstrap and Tier 2 eligibility transactions/routes
flow.state_transition: account becomes Tier 2 eligible when protocol state allows

flow.action: opt into node/operator and validation responsibilities
flow.protocol_gate: voluntary responsibility opt-in and readiness evidence
flow.state_transition: candidate readiness recorded; not manually activated

flow.action: activate validator set only at deterministic boundary
flow.protocol_gate: consensus threshold, validator readiness, one-node-per-user and revocation rules
flow.state_transition: active validator set updates deterministically when allowed
